description: Multi-model /team-review with an unsupported reviewer in roster. FR-MMT3 v1-supported set: {code-reviewer, security-reviewer, design-system-agent, performance-engineer}. Quality-engineer is NOT supported in v1. Roster validation aborts BEFORE team spawn — no native team, no external adapters, no orchestrator. Tests the abort path.

expected_abort.trigger: quality-engineer is outside v1-supported set {code-reviewer, security-reviewer, design-system-agent, performance-engineer}
expected_abort.message: Multi-model review aborted: roster contains unsupported reviewer 'quality-engineer'. Supported reviewers (v1): code-reviewer, security-reviewer, design-system-agent, performance-engineer. Either remove the reviewer or run /team-review without --multi-model.
side_effects_required: No tokens consumed beyond the validation prompt itself

verification_assertions: Validation fails fast: zero teammate spawns
Error message names the offending reviewer explicitly
Error message lists the v1-supported set
Exit code 2 (per CLAUDE.md hook conventions for blocking)
Re-running without --multi-model would succeed (single-model accepts any roster)
